name: Acaia Pearl Scale
desc: Overkill for most people. Essential for the rest of us. Connects to an app, measures to 0.1g, charges by USB. Worth every cent.

name: Aeropress Original
desc: $60. Makes incredible coffee. Survives being dropped. Works anywhere. There's a reason every specialty coffee person owns one.

name: 1Zpresso JX-Pro
desc: Hand grinder that rivals electric grinders twice its price. Produces exceptional grind consistency for espresso and filter.

name: Fellow Stagg EKG
desc: Temperature control, gooseneck for precision pouring, looks incredible on your bench. Does everything you need and nothing you don't.

name: Timemore C2
desc: The best value hand grinder on the market. At $80 it produces results that will embarrass grinders twice its price. Start here.

name: Hario V60 (size 02)
desc: The pour over brewer that started a movement. Ceramic or glass — both work. The conical design and spiral ribs produce a clean, bright cup.
